prompt: A photorealistic television news broadcast scene. On the right, a young Japanese female news anchor with shoulder-length dark brown hair and bangs looks directly at the camera with a professional expression. She wears a dark navy blazer over a white top, small earrings, and a lavalier microphone. The studio background features modern blue and silver illuminated panels. On the left, a large monitor displays a news graphic. The top of the monitor reads "{argument name="game name" default="Tokitori"}" followed by "{argument name="monitor top text" default="世界でも大人気のヒヨコゲーム"}". The left side of the monitor shows game cover art featuring a {argument name="character description" default="round, yellow chick character with big eyes"} on a green field, with the title "{argument name="game name" default="Tokitori"}" and text reading "{argument name="monitor achievement text" default="Steam売上 宇宙1位"}", "販売本数 1億本突破", and "同時接続数 345万人". The right side of the monitor displays a line graph titled "売り上げ推移" with an upward-trending yellow arrow, y-axis labels "0", "5000万", and "1億", and 3 x-axis dates "4/1", "4/10", and "4/20". A flat 2D version of the yellow chick sits on the graph line. Across the bottom of the screen is a prominent red lower-thirds breaking news banner. The left side of the banner has a box reading "速報" and the main text reads "{argument name="breaking news headline" default="TokitoriがSteam売り上げ宇宙1位に"}".
translatedPrompt: 一个照片级真实的电视新闻播报场景。右侧是一位年轻的日本女性新闻主播，留着齐肩深棕色短发和刘海，表情专业，直视镜头。她身穿深蓝色西装外套，内搭白色上衣，佩戴小巧耳环，并别着领夹式麦克风。演播室背景采用现代感十足的蓝色和银色发光面板。左侧的大型显示器展示着新闻图形。显示器顶部显示“{argument name="game name" default="Tokitori"}”，随后是“{argument name="monitor top text" default="世界でも大人気のヒヨコゲーム"}”。显示器左侧展示了游戏封面艺术，画面中是一个 {argument name="character description" default="圆滚滚、有着大眼睛的黄色小鸡角色"} 在绿色原野上，标题为“{argument name="game name" default="Tokitori"}”，文字内容包括“{argument name="monitor achievement text" default="Steam売上 宇宙1位"}”、“販売本数 1億本突破”以及“同時接続数 345万人”。显示器右侧展示了一张名为“売り上げ推移”的折线图，配有向上趋势的黄色箭头，Y 轴标签为“0”、“5000万”和“1億”，X 轴日期为“4/1”、“4/10”和“4/20”。黄色小鸡的平面 2D 版本位于折线上。屏幕底部是一条醒目的红色突发新闻横幅。横幅左侧的方框内写着“速報”，主标题文字为“{argument name="breaking news headline" default="TokitoriがSteam売り上げ宇宙1位に"}”。

breakdown.creativeCore: 日本突发新闻播报生成器：生成一个照片级真实的电视新闻播报场景，包含一位主播、可自定义的背景显示器图形以及下方的突发新闻横幅。
breakdown.subject: 产品
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: camera]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
